verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Children are scattered all over the land We’ve lost our love for our fellow man Fathers and mothers are parted today There’s dust on the altar where we used to pray

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let’s seek out the old paths and walk therein Our children are crying and dying in sin Satan is laughing as God’s people stray There’s dust on the altar where we used to pray

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tears that were once shed for a brother in need Are now called old fashioned, they’re no longer seen Greed and proud hearts have gotten in the way There’s dust on the altar where we used to pray
